title: Campbell’s Snacks plant in Jeffersonville set to close
description:

title: Randolph County judge to retire next month
description:
The Indiana Supreme Court announced Randolph Circuit Court Judge Jay Toney’s retirement in an order last week. His final day on the court will be July 6, 2026.
